name: Spaghetti Martini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat butter and olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add shallots and garlic; sauté about 2 minutes.
3. Add jalapeno and sauté for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Add tomatoes, vodka, vermouth, lime juice, tomato paste, white pepper, ground coriander, and salt.
5. Raise the heat and reduce, stirring frequently for about 3 minutes.
6. Add peppers and continue to simmer for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add cream and reduce for about 10 minutes.
8. When nearly at the desired consistency, add cilantro, parsley, Parmesan cheese, and simmer for another minute.
9. Keep the mixture warm until served.
10. Serve pasta topped generously with sauce, freshly grated Parmesan, olives, and a sprig of fresh cilantro (optional). Crushed red pepper is optional.
